[往]
Originally 㞷 ／ 𫭠 , a phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *ɢʷaŋ ): semantic 止 ( “ foot ” ) + phonetic 王 ( OC *ɢʷaŋ, *ɢʷaŋs ) ; see also the top component of 出 . Later 彳 was added to form 𢓸 , a phono-semantic compound ( 形聲 / 形声 , OC *ɢʷaŋ ): semantic 彳 ( “ to step ” ) + semantic 止 ( “ foot ” ) + phonetic 王 ( OC *ɢʷaŋ, *ɢʷaŋs ) . Eventually, the right component was stylized into the unrelated 主 . The footprint 屮 pointing upwards on top became a point as in the character 之 .
See also 迋 .

[徃] variant form of 往.
